tipRules.tip: Johnston: When the need calls for going deep for smallmouth, switch to a drop-shot rod with a Jackall Crosstail Shad.

knowledge.insight: Johnston: For tossing swimbaits up shallow for smallmouth, use a G.Loomis GLX 892S spinning rod with a Shimano Sustain 2500 reel. For deep drop-shot, use NRX 822S rods.
